title: Army announces upcoming unit deployments
description: WASHINGTON –The Department of the Army announced today the fall deployments of the following units to provide enhanced sustainment, engineering, and ope...
text:
WASHINGTON –The Department of the Army announced today the fall deployments of the following units to provide enhanced sustainment, engineering, communications and operational capabilities in support of the Department of Defense’s mission at the Southern Border:
The 101st Airborne Division (Air Assault) Headquarters to replace the 10th Mountain Division Headquarters. For more information, please contact the 101st Airborne Division Public Affairs Officer, Maj. Paul O’Daniel at paul.t.odaniel2.mil@army.mil or 270-798-3468.
The 10th Combat Aviation Brigade, 10th Mountain Division to replace the 1st Infantry Division Combat Aviation Brigade. For more information, please contact the 10th Mountain Division Public Affairs Officer, Maj. Geoffrey Carmichael at geoffrey.a.carmichael.mil@army.mil or 315-778-5759.
The 2nd Armored Brigade Combat Team, 1st Armored Division to replace the 2nd Stryker Brigade Combat Team, 4th Infantry Division. For more information, please contact the 1st Armored Division PAO, Lt. Col. Jessica Rovero at jessica.l.rovero.mil@army.mil or 915-744-8406.
The 101st Airborne Division (Air Assault) Division Artillery to replace the 89th Military Police Brigade. For more information, please contact 101st Airborne Division Public Affairs Officer, Maj. Paul O’Daniel at paul.t.odaniel2.mil@army.mil or 270-798-3468.
The 11th Corps Signal Brigade, III Armored Corps to replace the 35th Corps Signal Brigade, XVIII Airborne Corps. For more information, please contact the III Armored Corps Public Affairs Officer, Col. Kamil Sztalkoper at kamil.sztalkoper.mil@army.mil or 254-285-6729.
